title: Really Asuka
wikitext:
[]: Really Asuka???             Quote Post by aranami » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:34 pm At the end of EoE the person laying next to Shinji looks like Asuka. Is it really her? When she is fighting with the mass produced evas the damage taken by her eva was also done to her. when she is hit with the lance they show blood running from her eye. when Unit-02's arm is split down the middle, the next thing you see is Asuka's arm being split. Looking at this trend it is safe to assume that when Shinji sees Unit-02 being carried by its entrails, Asuka looks the same inside the entry plug. Thus she is dead or in massive amounts of pain. If she is dead who is next to Shinji. also notice that her bandages at the end are in the exact same places as Rei's when she is introduced one theory that I have herd is that she is the composition of Asuka Rei and Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:40 pm That theory was disproved by GAINAX itself if I recall correctly.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:41 pm she wasnt dead...just under enough pain to put her into a coma or something...when the MP evas initially gut her eva, she feels it but you dont see her guts coming out...

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:42 pm There is no way she survived that, the entry plug was destroyed along with the Eva's body.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:42 pm I really don't like that 'mix of all three women' theory. Her bandages coincide with the injuries she sustained during her final battle. And why people seem to think her eye is brown is just beyond me. It's clearly blue. Anyways, everyone is supposed to be able to be reborn because Shinji let them have the choice of remaining as one, or coming back if they could picture themselves clearly within their hearts. I usually think that Asuka was the first to reject that whole unity thing, and was the first to come back along side Shinji. On top of that, Shinji might have just wanted her to come back so he wouldnt be alone or something like that. I'm just curious to know if she saw a 'Rei' like everyone else did before they died, or if she was just killed before all of that started. I think she was... I'd have to watch it again.

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:42 pm You still have to wonder where those bandages came from. I don't remember her seeing a Rei and she died before the instrumentality goo thing happened. So technically she'd of just simply died.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:49 pm The bandages IMHO mean this. Rei needed Shinji in EP1, it was Shinji showing kindness to her over the course of the series that helped her grow and ultimently what let Rei III betray gendo. Asuka was bandaged the same way because she needed Shinji, even she ither didn't realize this her self of was disgusted by the fact she needed him.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:50 pm there was a scene with a Rei floating above a red plug suit... and the entry plug wasnt necessarily destroyed...the chest area was still intact...

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:52 pm If by 'intact' you mean 'ripped to shreds' than yes, yes it was. Right before she died (or before third impact if you think she survived....) Asuka sustained a lot of wounds, so when she returned to life after Third Impact, she imagined herself in her mind/heart with bandages. Ta da!

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:52 pm Oh, I'm gonna have to rewatch it cause I don't remember the red plugsuit scene. *digs through dvd collection*

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:52 pm the bandages to me were the final polar between the two characters she was not a combonation of the three although she was pregnant

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:53 pm DatDude wrote: The bandages IMHO mean this. Rei needed Shinji in EP1, it was Shinji showing kindness to her over the course of the series that helped her grow and ultimently what let Rei III betray gendo. Asuka was bandaged the same way because she needed Shinji, even she ither didn't realize this her self of was disgusted by the fact she needed him.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:54 pm No way in hell Anno intended for Asuka to be pregnant. Not a chance.

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:55 pm I agree...I don't think that she's pregnant. Unless of course you you take her being sick at the end as being some sort of morning sickness. Something I very much doubt.

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:56 pm Asuka Langley wrote: DatDude wrote: The bandages IMHO mean this. Rei needed Shinji in EP1, it was Shinji showing kindness to her over the course of the series that helped her grow and ultimently what let Rei III betray gendo. Asuka was bandaged the same way because she needed Shinji, even she ither didn't realize this her self of was disgusted by the fact she needed him.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Mon Jul 12, 2004 5:27 pm A masocist eh?

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon Jul 12, 2004 6:53 pm Esion wrote: I agree...I don't think that she's pregnant. Unless of course you you take her being sick at the end as being some sort of morning sickness. Something I very much doubt.

[]:             Quote Post by Somnius Kenate » Mon Jul 12, 2004 9:18 pm 1) She is not pregnant. 2) The theory of the combonation of the female characters was disproven by the Evangelion trading cards that came out that showed the female with red hair and blue eyes. It is Asuka and only Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Tue Jul 13, 2004 12:44 am Somnius Kenate wrote: 1) She is not pregnant. 2) The theory of the combonation of the female characters was disproven by the Evangelion trading cards that came out that showed the female with red hair and blue eyes. It is Asuka and only Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Tue Jul 13, 2004 1:01 am Timesplitter 01 wrote: The better question is if she is pregnant ( which she is not ) , how did she get pregnant.
